remarks: In time to cool off for the summer with 2 beautiful pools on the property. Welcome to Chesterfield Complex - The only private gated enclave in Stamford, surrounded by mature trees and serene setting. Most desirable mid-city location. This tranquil one-bedroom end unit townhome boasts open floor plan with spacious rooms and improvements. It features living room with vaulted ceilings, wood burning fireplace, skylights and slider to a private deck - a perfect place to unwind or for all outdoor entertaining. Bright eat-in kitchen, formal dining room and an exceptional large primary bedroom offering 4 closets (2 walk-ins). Floored attic which provides additional storage space. This must-see Townhome offers newer and recent improvements from heating & cooling systems, water heater to new gleaming hardwood floors. Crawl area, space for mechanicals and air handler. Unassigned parking for residents and guest. Chesterfield is a professionally managed and well-maintained complex with 2 beautiful outdoor pools. This rare find with low maintenance living is just minutes to shopping centers, parks, dining and to downtown. An unbeatable opportunity
